faqs.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faqs.sub: Everything you need to know before your visit. Can't find your answer? Reach out to us directly.
faqs.cta.title: Still have questions?
faqs.cta.sub: Our team is happy to help. Get in touch with us directly.
faqs.q1: How do I book an appointment?
faqs.a1: You can book directly through our website by visiting the Booking page. Simply choose your service, stylist, pick a time slot, and confirm. You will need to create an account or sign in.
faqs.q2: How far in advance should I book?
faqs.a2: We recommend booking at least 3 to 5 days in advance. For popular services like balayage, we suggest 1 to 2 weeks ahead, especially for weekends.
faqs.q3: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.a3: We accept cash, debit and credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), and e-transfers. Payment is collected at the time of your appointment.
faqs.a4: We primarily operate by appointment. However, we do accommodate walk-ins based on availability. We recommend calling ahead to check.
faqs.a5: We ask that you cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours before your appointment. Late cancellations or no-shows may be subject to a cancellation fee.
faqs.q6: How long does a balayage take?
faqs.a6: A full balayage typically takes between 2 to 3 hours depending on your hair length, thickness, and the level of color work required.
faqs.a7: Yes, we offer complimentary consultations for new clients and for complex color services.
faqs.q8: What should I do to prepare for my appointment?
faqs.a8: Come with clean, dry hair unless otherwise instructed. Bring inspiration photos if you have them. Avoid heavy styling products on the day of your appointment.
